title: The Dragon Egg (Useful Edition)
description: Basically a Datapack that makes the Dragon Egg actually useful! (amazing!!)
body:
![The Dragon Egg.. (credits to minecraft fandom wiki)](https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/minecraft_gamepedia/images/3/38/Dragon_Egg_JE4.png/revision/latest?cb=20211218053415)

# The Dragon Egg is USELESS.
## So I made it better.

This Datapack adds a lot of cool features!
The dragon egg can now spawn your very own dragon!
1. Step on your dragon egg
2. Ride your new dragon 
(btw it will go away after <10 seconds!)

## And then to get a cool custom golden carrot.
You have to smelt the dragon egg.


![Omlete Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/549e108617b692c9c79e82631d839d9aa058f06b.png)


Who would actually do this.
